description: Z-Image-Turbo + Smnth_v1 LoRA — anatomically detailed character / NSFW LoRA
_comment: LoRA by Kakelaka. Trained on Z-Image De-Turbo architecture to improve anatomical precision and skin textures for character Smnth_v1.
_comment_model: Base model: Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo — CFG-distilled single-stream DiT (6B params).
_comment_trigger: Trigger word: 'Smnth_v1' must appear in the prompt.
_comment_negative: Recommended: '(deformed iris, deformed pupils), text, watermark, logo, low quality, worst quality, blurry, grainy, (plastic skin, fake skin), (cartoon, anime, 3d, render), bad anatomy, wrong anatomy, extra limb, missing limb, floating limbs, mutation, ugly'.
_comment_guidance: Z-Image-Turbo is CFG-distilled → guidance_scale MUST be 0.0.
_comment_steps: 8–16 steps recommended. 12 gives a good balance of quality and speed.
_comment_lora_scale: 0.85 is a safe default. Range 0.7–1.0; lower values reduce character specificity.
_comment_dtype: bfloat16 used automatically on CUDA/MPS for best quality.
_comment_size: Z-Image-Turbo supports up to ~1 MP. 1024x1024 is the native resolution.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB VRAM. Uses pipe.enable_model_cpu_offload() internally.
